description: radar: Capture representative LD2451 UART bytes for empty frame, one target, multiple targets if supported, malformed/noisy stream, and trigger-worthy motion. Save fixtures or protocol notes in the repo, including baud rate, pins, frame shape, coordinate units, speed units/sign, and required initialization.

comments.text: Implementation attempt found no local LD2451 UART captures or authoritative protocol notes. Added docs-only capture/protocol notes in the rc-edm.2 workspace, but full fixture coverage is blocked until real LD2451 UART captures or an authoritative protocol document are available. Do not close this task or start rc-edm.4 from it until that data exists.

title: radar: Add LD2451 protocol capture fixtures
